name: ai-inventory-tracker
description: AI-powered inventory tracker with forecasting, anomaly detection, and natural language search.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.mock: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "cross-env MOCK_DATA=true npm run mock --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
